title: RegionGuard
description: A region management plugin, with flags for each region.
body:
### Another Region plugin? No!
RegionGuard is more lightweight than any region plugin, and easier to use.
- RegionGuard doesn't have any dependencies, like Worldguard, that needs Worldedit.
- Less, but more sophisticated flags, and they are easier to understand.
- Similar commands to WorldGuard, so switching to RegionGuard is easier!
- No huge config files. The plugin only has 2 files, a messages, and a file for storing regions, both can be reloaded with /reguard reload!
- New Flags every update!

### Commands, and features.
Commands:
- The main command is /reguard, and it has some subcommands like:
  - create = it creates a new region
  - flag = it modifies the flag of the region
  - list = it lists the regions created
- Download the plugin to find out more!

Coming, unique features:
- In the next update: i want to create a 'merge' subcommand, that merges regions into 1 region, with this, you can create unique shaped regions, like circles.
- Wrap — In a more late update, the plugin will conform the selected region to the shape you select. For example, if you select a sphere, the region will wrap tightly around it, ensuring that only your shape is included within the protected area.
